{{Quote|Don't be the kind of commander who leaves things to others.|Grudo|<ref name="Jedi Trial">''[[Jedi Trial]]''</ref>}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Grudo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Infantry/Legends|soldier]] who fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and in many previous conflicts against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Grudo isn't a bounty hunter, he's an old soldier. He's been in more battles and on more campaigns than most regular soldiers. He's led troops in battle his whole life.|[[Nejaa Halcyon]]|<ref name="Jedi Trial" />}}
In order to leave [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]], Grudo had pretended to be a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], and often wore several sheathed knives in bandoleers across his chest. He found his way into the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom|Freedom's Sons]] organization, though he was [[Mission to Bpfassh (Separatist Crisis)|captured]] on [[Bpfassh]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]], while delaying the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] so that the rest of the Sons could escape on Halcyon's own ship, the ''[[Plooriod Bodkin]]''. Halcyon allowed him to go free, not wanting to return a laughing-stock with a single prisoner, on the condition that Grudo stay on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] until Halcyon called on him.

Grudo was later was conscripted to fight in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], and, after arriving on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]], he volunteered to go on a reconnaissance mission led by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] L'Loxx, to probe the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] lines for any possible weaknesses. As he was returning from the successful mission, Grudo was shot in the head by a fellow soldier named [[Odie Subu]]. Subu had just escaped near death and thought she heard the enemy approach, so she fired her blaster at Grudo instinctively. After being taken to the aid station Grudo was visited by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and died right after he told Skywalker not to cry for him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
